Mukamuka stream to south saddle track
Kingsley track
trails.description: Easy Tramping Track from end of Kingsley St.

trails.name: Tawhai route
trails.description: Steep narrow route from head of Stokes Valley.

trails.name: Kamahi street track
trails.description: Track up from end of Kamahi St to ECNZ Track on ridge.

EAST PAPATAHI CROSSING - WESTERN LAKE RO
FRITH TRACK - PYLON ROAD TO TAUHERENIKAU

Pinnacles Ridge Track
trails.description: Pinnacles Ridge Track leads to a lookout with dramatic views of earth pillar formations.

trails.name: Honeycomb Rock Walkway
trails.description: Honeycomb Rock is a spectacular outcrop on the Wairarapa coast, so named because of the cell-like weathering pattern which gives the rock a honeycomb appearance.

trails.name: Kahikatea Walk
trails.description: Walk through recovering wetland and remnant of flooded forest on this short, easy loop walk - a good option for kids.

trails.name: Papatahi Crossing
trails.description: Fit and experienced trampers can cross the Remutaka Range via Papatahi (902 m) from mid-Ōrongorongo valley to the Wairarapa side of the Remutaka Forest Park.

trails.name: Remutaka Rail Trail
trails.description: Built in 1878, this rail route between the Hutt Valley and Featherston is now a gently graded 18 km walk, run or mountain bike ride, with opportunities for camping, swimming and fishing.

trails.name: Smith Creek - Tauherenikau River
trails.description: This is a daytrip in the southern Tararua Range and the exit/entry to the Kaitoke-Holdsworth Tramp.

trails.name: Aorangi Crossing
trails.description: Cross the Aorangi Range from Putangirua Pinnacles to Cape Palliser.

trails.name: Honeycomb Rock Walkway
trails.description: Honeycomb Rock is a spectacular outcrop on the Wairarapa coast, so named because of the cell-like weathering pattern which gives the rock a honeycomb appearance.
